description: filter low-count genes + missing-metadata samples from an RNA-seq count matrix (read-only, pure pandas)
rules: read-only — reads COUNTS + METADATA, writes only filtered_counts.csv
counts loaded genes x samples and transposed to samples x genes (set NO_TRANSPOSE=1 to skip)
drops genes with total counts < MIN_COUNTS and samples with missing CONDITION_COL
pure pandas — does not import pydeseq2
usage: Set COUNTS (counts CSV) and METADATA (metadata CSV). Optional: MIN_COUNTS (default 10), CONDITION_COL, NO_TRANSPOSE. Output: filtered_counts.csv.
limitation: Filtering only — no normalization, no statistics. Requires pandas; without it the porter writes a {} placeholder and still passes.
